_publications._publicationTitle: Unbalancing cAMP and Ras/MAPK pathways as a therapeutic strategy for cutaneous neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: To identify an expression profile specific to SC-FB crosstalk, a differential expression analysis between real and virtual cocultures was performed, and results were plotted in a heatmap
details: Used for differential expression analysis between real and virtual cocultures to identify transcriptional signature containing upregulated and downregulated genes specific to SC-FB crosstalk
